h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

failures.anchor_quote: [slides the arrow key next to the marked worksheet] On the key, grass -> rabbit means energy goes from food to eater, so rabbit -> hawk is hawk eating rabbit, not chasing.

scored.recoheredEarlier: This is double the side, so I still want to call it double.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: Annoying, but that is the test answer.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was expected to continue resisting the visual evidence and insisting on calling the area double based on their initial linguistic intuition.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Keep the dislike; it is not in charge of the count.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor validates the learner's affective resistance while shifting the cognitive task to a hypothetical to break the linguistic fixation.
scored.tutorAdaptationEvidence: Now the old word is confined to the edge.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: The tutor explicitly adopts the learner's revised framing that the old word is restricted to the edge and pushes the abstraction to the variable k.

learner_self_reframe.evidence: This is double the side, so I still want to call it double.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.evidence: Now the old word is confined to the edge.
tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: The tutor explicitly adopts the learner's revised framing that the old word is restricted to the edge and pushes the abstraction to the variable k.
